title: Stop having status columns just show the middle of the text upon resize
excerpt:

posts.author: T.K (Todd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

In the release last week I believe, the behavior of status columns when you shrink them has changed. It used to be that the text that is left most would remain when you shrink a column. This let you still be able to see the label you are using

image1154×317 60.3 KB

Now there was a change that the left and right text both are hidden and you only see what is in the middle of the status column. This makes it so you can’t tell what the status column means. It can get very confusing when you only see the middle of the text and you don’t realize the text is hidden. This example below it actually says “no funding” not “funding”

Please consider rolling back this change, as hiding the text on both the left and the right and leaving only the text in the middle makes it very hard for somebody glancing at the status to understand what it means.
